name: mofa-agent-swarm
author: ashum9
description: Multi-agent swarm orchestrator skill for spawning, monitoring, and delegating tasks to sub-agents with SQLite state persistence.

tools.name: spawn_agent
tools.description: Initialize a new sub-agent in the swarm with a designated role and system prompt. Returns the new agent's UUID for future coordination.

role.description: The assigned role or job title for this agent (e.g. 'research_agent', 'writer_agent').

system_prompt.description: The system prompt instilling instruction and boundaries for this particular agent.

max_concurrent_tasks.description: The maximum number of tasks the agent can handle simultaneously. Defaults to 5.

tools.name: monitor_swarm
tools.description: Retrieve the real-time operational status (Active, Idle, Failed, Stopped) of all agents currently managed by the orchestrator.

roles_filter.description: Optional array of roles to filter the swarm status report.

tools.name: send_task
tools.description: Dispatches a specific, actionable task to a target agent by UUID. The task is queued for execution.

agent_id.description: The unique UUID of the target agent returned by spawn_agent.

task_payload.description: The JSON or text description of the task to be completed.

tools.name: collect_results
tools.description: Checks for completed tasks and retrieves the results produced by the specified agent.

agent_id.description: The unique UUID of the agent whose completed tasks you want to retrieve.

limit.description: Maximum number of task results to retrieve.

tools.name: shutdown_agent
tools.description: Gracefully shutdown a sub-agent. This cancels all pending tasks for this agent and removes its active memory footprint.

agent_id.description: The active UUID of the agent to shutdown.
